data.body:
COMPLETION EVIDENCE (execution-outcome ACs).
'make lint && make typecheck && make test green' and 'full reconcile suite green + whole tree collects cleanly': attested by Verified+1 on Gerrit change 914 (MERGED to main) — CI ran the full gate + suite (make lint, make typecheck, and the pytest matrix on py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macos) on this patchset and passed, which is the authoritative execution evidence. Also validated locally in the worktree:
 - make lint: PASS (ruff check + format + zizmor + actionlint + DCO).
 - make typecheck: Success, no issues found in 369 source files.
 - pytest tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/ tests/integration/rebar_reconciler/: 1381 passed.
 - whole-tree collection: 7183 tests collected, 0 errors (pytest tests/ --co).
 - tests/unit/test_module_size_contract.py: 4 passed (all touched files <=800 LOC; outbound_differ.py=799).
 - Teeth: mutating outbound_differ to drop the injected mapper makes tests/unit/rebar_reconciler/test_backend_neutrality.py::test_outbound_differ_uses_injected_mapper go RED (injection is wired, not bypassed).
